Title: ANY ORDER
Feature: SELECT ANY ORDER n select_list FROM table_name ...
Description: ANY ORDER allows a query to return a limited number of rows without requiring a deterministic ordering.
This relaxes ordering constraints and can be used as a performance optimization when exact ordering is not important.
Examples: SELECT ANY ORDER 100 * FROM big_table WHERE some_flag = 1;
Category: Virtuoso Extension: Query Optimization / Row Limiting
